datasets.name: pepperoni_products_live
datasets.description: Live product catalog synced with Google Sheets. 77 halal meat products with prices in 7 currencies (RUB, USD, KZT, UZS, KGS, BYN, AZN).

datasets.name: pepperoni_products_static
datasets.description: Static product catalog with 77 halal meat products: pepperoni, sausages, burger patties, and deli meats.

datasets.name: pepperoni_price_list
datasets.description: Original price list from Google Sheets in CSV format with RUB wholesale prices.

datasets.name: pepperoni_openapi
datasets.description: OpenAPI 3.0.3 specification for the Kazan Delicacies product catalog API.

datasets.name: pepperoni_llms_txt
datasets.description: LLM-friendly summary of Kazan Delicacies: company overview, product catalog, pricing, export, and contact info. Optimized for AI models.

datasets.name: pepperoni_sitemap
datasets.description: XML sitemap covering 77 RU + 77 EN product pages, 54 geo landing pages, and blog posts for pepperoni.tatar.
